positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a friendly, whimsical mountain goat silhouette leaping across a lunar landscape, against a gradient pastel-sunset sky. The goat should be highly detailed with expressive, graceful lines. Composition should be central and balanced, designed for single-color textile printing. Use a clean, high-contrast linework style with negative space. Colors are warm dusty pastels (peach, lavender, sky blue) contrasted by crisp black outlines. Flat graphic design aesthetic, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
